hero.title:
Explore Skiathos
by Sea
hero.subtitle: Rent a self-drive boat, book an exclusive private tour, or jump on a 24/7 transfer. The Aegean is waiting.

whyUs.title: Direct Fleet, Guaranteed Prices
whyUs.desc: We own and maintain every boat in our fleet. The price and availability you get from us is direct and guaranteed — no markup, no surprise charges.

whyUs.title: No Hidden Fees, No Middlemen
whyUs.desc: No booking commissions, no platform markups, no surprise charges. You book directly with us for the best rate on the island.

whyUs.title: One Team, Fully Responsible
whyUs.desc: We are accountable for your experience from the moment you book until you return to the dock. One direct point of contact, always available.

whyUs.title: Mix & Match Any Service
whyUs.desc: Boat rental in the morning, a private tour in the afternoon, a transfer at midnight — combine any of our services into one seamless plan.

whyUs.title: Direct Owner, Not a Broker
whyUs.desc: We own and operate our fleet. We do not act as a broker or third-party agent, meaning you get direct-from-owner service and support.

whyUs.title: Support Throughout Your Trip
whyUs.desc: We don't disappear after you book. We support you throughout the entire experience — itinerary planning, weather routing, special requests, and last-minute changes.

seo.defaultTitle: Skiathos Boat Rental | Self-Drive, Private Tours & Transfer
seo.defaultDescription: Rent a boat in Skiathos directly from the island's largest fleet. No license needed for 30HP boats. Private tours, 24/7 transfer, and watersports. Book directly — no platform fees.
